title: paeonia obovata subsp. willmottiae
intro: Paeonia obovata subsp. willmottiae, also known as the Willmott's peony, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the peony family (Paeoniaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia obovata subsp. willmottiae include reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are typically used to make decoctions or infusions, which can be taken as a tea or used topically as a poultice.
